research_motivation: Group J as of June 21: Argentina 3 pts, GD +3; Jordan 0 pts, GD -2. Argentina still had Austria and Jordan had Algeria on June 22, so the exact qualification and rotation state for June 27 was unavailable.
research_weather: Dallas Stadium is AT&T Stadium in Arlington, a retractable-roof, climate-controlled venue, with a 21:00 local kickoff. Roof status and a reliable external forecast were unavailable by the cutoff.
